step1.title: Open Notion Database
step1.description: Access the Rensto Business References database

step2.title: Add Type Property
step2.description: Add a Select property for categorizing records
step2.action: Click "+" next to Name property → Select "Select" → Name it "Type"

step3.title: Add Description Property
step3.description: Add a Rich Text property for detailed descriptions
step3.action: Click "+" next to Type property → Select "Text" → Name it "Description"

step4.title: Add Customer Property
step4.description: Add a Rich Text property for customer identification
step4.action: Click "+" next to Description property → Select "Text" → Name it "Customer"

step5.title: Add Status Property
step5.description: Add a Select property for status tracking
step5.action: Click "+" next to Customer property → Select "Select" → Name it "Status"

step6.title: Add Priority Property
step6.description: Add a Select property for priority levels
step6.action: Click "+" next to Status property → Select "Select" → Name it "Priority"

step7.title: Add Platform Property
step7.description: Add a Rich Text property for technology platform
step7.action: Click "+" next to Priority property → Select "Text" → Name it "Platform"

step8.title: Add Last Updated Property
step8.description: Add a Date property for tracking modifications
step8.action: Click "+" next to Platform property → Select "Date" → Name it "Last Updated"

step9.title: Add Created By Property
step9.description: Add a Rich Text property for creator information
step9.action: Click "+" next to Last Updated property → Select "Text" → Name it "Created By"

step10.title: Add RGID Property
step10.description: Add a Rich Text property for Rensto Global ID
step10.action: Click "+" next to Created By property → Select "Text" → Name it "RGID"

dataOrganization.description: Organize existing data from Name fields into structured properties

records.name: Shelly Insurance Agent Onboarding
records.description: Insurance agent onboarding process with Make.com and N8N integration. Includes: Make.com scenarios, N8N workflows, insurance profile processing, PDF generation.

records.name: Local-il.com Leads Generation
records.description: Lead generation system with Facebook agent and data processing. Includes: Facebook agent for lead generation, 12,000+ leads processing, data enrichment and validation.

records.name: Tax4Us Onboarding Process
records.description: Complete onboarding process for Ben Ginati Tax4Us with 4 AI agents. Includes: 1) WordPress Blog Agent, 2) Podcast Agent, 3) Social Media Agent, 4) Orchestration Agent. Revenue: $4,000 pending completion.

records.name: Enhanced Error Handling Templates
records.description: Comprehensive error handling system with 14 tools and 6 categories. Includes: Error detection, logging, notification, recovery, monitoring, alerting.

records.name: Webhook Security Implementation
records.description: Multi-layer security framework with HMAC signature validation. Includes: Security monitoring, alert system, real-time dashboards, performance metrics.

immediate: Add all 9 properties manually in Notion UI
Populate properties with extracted data from Name fields
integration: Set up bidirectional sync with Airtable
